purpose: Persist the first strict-evaluator local re-audit so the rebuild line stops relying on shortcut-heavy local scores.

notes: Open-text inference now uses diagnosis + repair_action semantics instead of raw JSON response text.
Evidence-phrase echoes no longer count as action hits.
Negative repair language such as 'no repair action required' suppresses false positives.
HDFS family inference now has a separate semantic pass so RCA can remain decoupled from action matching.

rejected_hdfs_storage_probes.reason: Under the strict evaluator, all open-text methods fail while heuristic_context remains solvable, so the candidate does not produce a thesis-grade storage slot.
Under the strict evaluator, all open-text methods fail while heuristic_context remains solvable, so the invalidSet/delete-intent anchor is not a stable replacement either.

notes: RCA is partially recoverable: vanilla_open and agent_open both reach family_accuracy 0.75 at noise 1.0.
Action recovery is not stable: agent_open action_accuracy is 0.0 and e2e_accuracy is 0.0.
hdfs_19 behaves like routine replica exchange under the strict evaluator and should not remain in the formal slice.
hdfs_38 stays family-only and still lacks a credible remediation.
At noise 1.0, open_alert_only and vanilla_open both stay at family_accuracy 0.0.
rag_open reaches family/e2e 0.5 and agent_open reaches family/e2e 0.75.
openstack_48, openstack_49, and openstack_51 remain usable under the strict evaluator.
openstack_56 now looks like successful termination cleanup rather than a repair-worthy drift case and should be replaced.
Overall at noise 1.0, agent_open reaches family/e2e 0.6, rag_open 0.4, vanilla_open 0.4.
The cleanup case 1445087491445_0001 and storage-pressure case 1445182159119_0001 remain usable.
The isolate-node replacement 1445076437777_0003 is only provisional: alert-only and vanilla already solve the family, rag fails, and only agent reaches e2e.
The control-link pair 1445175094696_0001 and 1445175094696_0003 are not admissible under the strict evaluator.

next_rebuild_targets: Replace openstack_56 with another instance-state drift case that is not a successful cleanup path.
Replace hdfs_19 and hdfs_38, and redesign the HDFS storage slot rather than patching addStoredBlock/delete anchors again.
Rebuild the Hadoop control-link pair and re-audit the isolate-node case before any new formal small.
